_header.file_role: provenance sidecar for llama31_405b.json (E1 training-side anchor)

S1.name: meta-llama/llama-models (official Meta GitHub), models/sku_list.py, llama3_1_405b arch_args

S3.name: The Llama 3 Herd of Models, arXiv:2407.21783v3, Table 3 (405B column) and Section 3.3.2/Table 4 (training parallelism + BF16 MFU)

ffn_dim.source: S2 official formula: int(2*(4*16384)/3)=43690; int(1.2*43690)=52428; round up to multiple 4096 -> 53248; cross-check S3 Table 3 (FFN Dimension 53,248)

pretrain_context.source: S1 (use_scaled_rope, original 8k), S3 Table 4 (Seq. Len. 8,192 stage 1)

training_tokens.source: S3 Section 3 ('405B trainable parameters on 15.6T text tokens', 3.8e25 FLOPs)

training_parallelism.value: TP=8, CP=1, PP=16, DP=64 (8192 GPUs, stage 1); TP=8, CP=1, PP=16, DP=128 (16384 GPUs); TP=8, CP=16, PP=16, DP=4 (long-context stage)

total_params_b.source: computed with AC parameter ledger from S1/S3 dims; consistent with the model class (405B)

notes: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B on Hugging Face is license-gated; fields come from Meta's official GitHub repository and the arXiv paper, both public.
This config backs the training-side T2 anchor only (Llama-3 405B MFU); it is not part of the vLLM serving fleet (no T1 serving anchor planned for 405B).
